caption: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a teal V-neck blouse and a silver necklace, stands behind a white podium in a minimalist room with a plain grey background. The "mediasite" logo is visible in the top left corner of the scene. On the podium, there are several microphones and the edges of computer monitors. The woman begins by looking forward and speaking, then lowers her head and gaze toward the podium. She then turns her head to the left, smiling while continuing to look in that direction. Throughout the sequence, she remains positioned behind the podium, with her hands resting on its surface.
